GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "How to wear Tommy Hilfiger's spring 2020 collection", "Straight off the runway from Tommy Hilfiger's TommyNow show in London last month, Vogue Australia's stylist shares how to wear the Tommy and TommyxLewis pieces in your own wardrobe. "Sustainability, inclusion, genderless," that was how Tommy Hilfiger described his see-now-buy-now spring 2020 collection backstage at his show in February. He represented this vision with go-anywhere denim, logo T-shirts, must-have hoodies and statement knits – these are all pieces that can infiltrate any wardrobe with the right approach. "All the pieces from Tommy's collection are very reflective of Tommy Hilfiger as a brand, however they are quite timeless and can easily be paired-back for a casual look, or dressed up," says stylist Rachel Wayman. A leather belted midi skirt is dressed down with a unisex knit jumper, while hero pieces such as this season's pinstripe tailored blazer and matching bermuda short can be styled together for a more put-together look. "You can also pair the blazer with jeans and a heel for Friday drinks or paired with a sneaker for casual Sunday," Rachel adds. If your personal style is all about ease-of-dressing then invest in this must-have piece, the folard print dress. Slip it on and belt the navy cotton tie and you're good to go. As for Rachel's pick this season? "I love the classic black hoodie with the embodied emblem. It's a timeless piece with a sporty twist." Shop the Tommy Hilfiger spring 2020 collection here."
